items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #4' aims to confirm that support staff cannot bypass authentication. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. As such, there is no concrete evidence to support the validation of this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
